details.test: Task 1: RFQ for stainless shaft with tight tolerance and <=15-day standard lead time
Task 2: Service search by process/material/tolerance and submit service inquiry
Task 3: Cost estimator comparison and RFQ with preferred material
Task 4: Aerospace case study <=10 days and Start a Similar Project
Task 5: Equipment search and comparison of three capable machines
Task 6: Plant tour scheduling for weekday morning next month
Task 7: Cart with 3 standard parts under $150 (2+ turning, 1 milling or fallback)
Task 8: Lead-time calculation for 500 anodized & inspected parts with <=12-day option
